label: Market Detail
description: Single market detail view with price history, order book summary, and quick trade entry.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx.

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file.

0.7.note: Empty state: Card with 'Select a market from the Markets grid' prompt when selectedMarket is null.

1.1.note: Reads selectedMarket, markets, setSelectedMarketId via usePredictionsData().

1.3.note: Market list global — scope filtering on positions, not market catalogue.

1.4.note: clientIds gap acknowledged — same open gap as other domains.

1.5.note: Strategy filter N/A for market detail display.

1.6.note: Empty scope returns full market list.

1.7.note: No reference data in lib/mocks/ consumed by this widget.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea. Re-audit only if wiring test fails.

3.1.note: Applies: live ✓, paper ✓ (read-only detail view), batch ✓ (read-only). Trade entry inside MarketDetailPanel — batch disable on that sub-component is human-verified.

3.2.note: Context exposes mode from useExecutionMode(); MarketDetailPanel can receive it as prop.

3.5.note: Paper mode: detail view unchanged; trade forms should show simulated flag — human verify.

3.6.note: No direct WebSocket or setInterval in this widget file.

l3.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 3.3 — verify trade entry inside MarketDetailPanel is disabled in batch mode; 3.4 — visual batch indicator.

4.1.note: No dead buttons in widget file. onClose and onSelectRelated are wired.

4.5.note: No gated route links in widget file.

l4.notes: Agent prep complete. Human: 4.3/4.4 — verify MarketDetailPanel shows price chart, order book summary, trade form; 4.7/4.8 — scroll and tab behavior.

5.1.note: Detail panel for all prediction strategies: PRED_POLY_ARB_SCE_1M, PRED_BTC_CEFI_ARB_SCE_5M, PREDICTION_POLY_ML_DIR_EVT_4H.

l5.notes: Agent prep (5.1) complete. Human: 5.2-5.6 — confirm detail populates for binary and multi-outcome markets on both Polymarket and Kalshi.

7.1.note: text-rose-400 replaced with text-destructive. No other hardcoded hex/rgb.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: No text-[...] arbitrary font sizes in widget file.

8.4.note: Agent: no bare img/input/div-onClick issues. Human: keyboard + screen-reader walk.

l8.notes: Agent checks (8.1-8.3) pass. Human: 8.4 keyboard walk + 8.5 resize at minW=4.

keepSeparate.rationale: Detail panel is a distinct view driven by market selection; keeping separate allows flexible layout composition.

relationships.notes: Driven by setSelectedMarketId from pred-markets-grid. Also can be driven by pred-top-markets.

dataContract.notes: Production: REST + WebSocket for live price/odds updates on selected market.

gaps: MarketDetailPanel sub-component not yet wired to live price feed
Binary vs multi-outcome layout parity not verified on both venues
coverage.notes: Widget delegates rendering to MarketDetailPanel in components/trading/predictions/.

findings.description: pred-market-detail-widget.tsx — No loading or error guard initially.
pred-market-detail-widget.tsx:27 — text-rose-400 hardcoded color in error state

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21
